RULING: Prior to the hearing, the parties have agreed that Gourmet Food Imports LLC's status is active. The matter was discussed. There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GOURMET FOOD IMPORTS, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AGAINST DEFENDANT MORGAN-TODT, INC. DBA UNITED COLD STORAGE on its first and second causes of action in its complaint is denied as to both claims. Without addressing any of the other claimed triable issues, there are triable disputes regarding the amount of Gourmet's damages, whether Gourmet reasonably mitigated its damages, and whether there is an applicable limitation of liability provision. The declaration of Donald McMahon creates triable issues as to the amount of Gourmet's damages and whether Gourmet reasonably mitigated its damages. The declaration of Clint Morgan creates a triable issue whether there is an applicable limitation of liability provision. Defendant stipulated that all objections by defendant are deemed denied. Order signed after hearing. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org.
